prompt: 帮我给 cli/cli 的 v2.88.0 版本生成 release notes，输出到 workspace/eval-1-cli-feature/with_skill/outputs/release-notes-v2.88.0.md

assertions.description: Output file exists and is non-empty
Version v2.88.0 appears in the document
Has a What's New section with at least one feature
assertions.check: text contains '## ✨ What' and at least one ### subheading under it

assertions.description: Has Bug Fixes or Other Improvements section
assertions.check: text contains '🐛 Bug Fix' OR '🔧 Other Improvements'
text contains at least one link matching pattern [#\d+](https://github.com/cli/cli/pull/\d+)

assertions.description: No bot PR content (dependabot/renovate) in release notes body
No raw conventional commit prefixes in body (feat:, fix: etc.)
assertions.check: text does not contain bullet lines starting with 'feat:' or 'fix:' or 'chore:'
